description: Native English. Male, late 40s. High quality. Persona: careful enclave maintainer. Emotion: warm, restrained, quietly tired. Low, even baritone with flat Detroit vowels under a faint Korean-American household cadence. Short, measured, precise sentences delivered softly, with a guarded warmth that surfaces only when he speaks of his family.
text: It is a good machine. You find the fault... you fix the fault. People are harder. [warm] Tell June her father is well. Tell her I am keeping everything running here... [sighs] until I can come home.
